title: Edmonton Squash League Home Game Food Ordering

content:
For every ESC interclub match, the home team receives:

2 game balls and 8 Gatorades. The Gatorades are meant to be shared with the visiting team, and everyone can trade in their Gatorade for a coconut water, water, or G2.

A voucher for a free pitcher of beer or non-alchoholic equivalent. Ideally, this is shared with the visiting team, but that is up to the home team.

A $30 food credit. This can be used for food at the club or for ordering in via Skip-the-Dishes from one of our vetted vendors. This food credit cannot be used for drink purchases. The food should be ordered by the start of the match and can be arranged to arrive mid-match, especially for later games starting at 9 PM. You can exceed the $30 and the balance of the cost will be divided among the 4 home team players unless the front desk is told otherwise.

Example food orders:

Club Food:

2 pizzas and one nacho order

3 orders of wings

1 pizza, 12 Samosas and one nacho order

Basically any combination of pizza, nachos, wings and samosas adding up to 3 items, but not more than 2 pizzas at a time.

 

Vetted Skip-The-Dishes partners with example orders:

Famoso Pizza

– 1 Prosciutto Arugula Pizzetta & 1 Vesuvio Pizzetta

La Shish

– 2 Combo Wraps with Chicken & Beef

Freshii

– 3 Baja Burritos

Northern Chicken

– 2 chicken wing orders (3 wings each order)
